l1: This discipline is under active development — probing commands will be added by the Performance tech lead.
To contribute diagnostic commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Get-Counter -ListSet * | Select-String CPU,Memory,Disk' to list available performance counters.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced probing will be added by the Performance tech lead.
To contribute advanced diagnostic commands, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'xperf -on DiagEasy -f C:\trace.etl' to capture a WPA/ETW trace for advanced performance analysis.

l1: This discipline is under active development — troubleshooting steps will be added by the Performance tech lead.
To contribute resolution steps, see CONTRIBUTING.md in the repository root.
Run 'Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select -First 10' to identify top CPU consumers.
l2: This discipline is under active development — advanced troubleshooting will be added by the Performance tech lead.

Analyse the WPA trace in Windows Performance Analyzer — look for CPU scheduling, disk I/O wait, and memory pressure events.
